strongestIdea: A GPT Image 2 prompt packet for a single-read concierge Otis: broad matte fabric blocks, very limited aged-brass accents, soft Santa warmth without costume noise, and explicit anti-gloss language to preserve human imperfection.
uniquenessClaim: Unlike lanes that may push silhouette, game-sprite readability, or richer personality detail, this lane makes restraint the differentiator: fewer materials, fewer accents, cleaner outfit reads, and app-scale failure criteria.
qualityRisks: No actual image files were generated, so material simplification has not been visually proven.
The prompt may understate ornamentation enough that Otis could become too plain unless the coordinator preserves the port-red/brass identity cues.
GPT Image 2 may still over-polish skin, eyes, beard, or brass unless the negative prompt is applied tightly.
Outfit Variant B could drift too close to formal tuxedo language if matte dinner-concierge jacket is not enforced.
fallbackReason: Requested GPT-5.5 fast mode with extra-high reasoning was not exposed in this Codex session; produced prompt/art-direction artifacts only.
promotionBlockers: No generated source images exist from this lane.
No alpha preflight, derivative generation, contact sheet, or browser/app-scale preview was performed.
Coordinator must generate images and run production QA before any app approval or promotion.
